                             new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                stateDesc,\n                                new InternalSingleValueWindowFunction<>(\n                                        new ReducedSessionWindowFunction()),\n                                EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                                lateness,\n                                lateOutputTag);\n\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple3<String, Long, Long>>\n                testHarness = createTestHarness(operator);\n\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> expected = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> sideExpected = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 1000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1999));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1999));\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 2000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(4998));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(4998));\n\n        // this will not be dropped because the session we're adding two has maxTimestamp\n        // after the current watermark\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 4500));\n\n        // new session\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 8500));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(7400));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(7400));\n\n        // this will merge the two sessions into one\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 7000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(11501));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-5\", 1000L, 11500L), 11499));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(11501));\n\n        // new session\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 11600));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(14600));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-1\", 11600L, 14600L), 14599));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(14600));\n\n        // this is sideoutput as late, reuse last timestamp\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 10000));\n        sideExpected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 10000));\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 14500));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(20000));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-1\", 14500L, 17500L), 17499));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(20000));\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(100000));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(100000));\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> actual = testHarness.getOutput();\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<StreamRecord<Tuple2<String, Integer>>> sideActual =\n                testHarness.getSideOutput(lateOutputTag);\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\", expected, actual, new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"SideOutput was not correct.\",\n                sideExpected,\n                (Iterable) sideActual,\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n        testHarness.close();\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void testDropDueToLatenessSessionWithLatenessPurgingTrigger() throws Exception {\n\n        // this has the same output as testSideOutputDueToLatenessSessionZeroLateness() because\n        // the allowed lateness is too small to make a difference\n\n        final int gapSize = 3;\n        final long lateness = 10;\n\n        ReducingStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> stateDesc =\n                new ReducingStateDescriptor<>(\n                        \"window-contents\",\n                        new SumReducer(),\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Tuple3<String, Long, Long>,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                EventTimeSessionWindows.withGap(Duration.ofSeconds(gapSize)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                stateDesc,\n                                new InternalSingleValueWindowFunction<>(\n                                        new ReducedSessionWindowFunction()),\n                                PurgingTrigger.of(EventTimeTrigger.create()),\n                                lateness,\n                                lateOutputTag);\n\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple3<String, Long, Long>>\n                testHarness = createTestHarness(operator);\n\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> expected = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 1000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1999));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1999));\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 2000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(4998));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(4998));\n\n        // this will not be dropped because the session we're adding two has maxTimestamp\n        // after the current watermark\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 4500));\n\n        // new session\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 8500));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(7400));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(7400));\n\n        // this will merge the two sessions into one\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 7000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(11501));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-5\", 1000L, 11500L), 11499));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(11501));\n\n        // new session\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 11600));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(14600));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-1\", 11600L, 14600L), 14599));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(14600));\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 10000));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-1\", 10000L, 14600L), 14599));\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 14500));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(20000));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-1\", 10000L, 17500L), 17499));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(20000));\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(100000));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(100000));\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> actual = testHarness.getOutput();\n\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\", expected, actual, new Tuple3ResultSortComparator());\n        testHarness.close();\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void testNotSideOutputDueToLatenessSessionWithLateness() throws Exception {\n        // same as testSideOutputDueToLatenessSessionWithLateness() but with an accumulating\n        // trigger, i.e.\n        // one that does not return FIRE_AND_PURGE when firing but just FIRE. The expected\n        // results are therefore slightly different.\n\n        final int gapSize = 3;\n        final long lateness = 10;\n\n        ReducingStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> stateDesc =\n                new ReducingStateDescriptor<>(\n                        \"window-contents\",\n                        new SumReducer(),\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Tuple3<String, Long, Long>,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                EventTimeSessionWindows.withGap(Duration.ofSeconds(gapSize)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                stateDesc,\n                                new InternalSingleValueWindowFunction<>(\n                                        new ReducedSessionWindowFunction()),\n                                EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                                lateness,\n                                lateOutputTag /* late data output tag */);\n\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple3<String, Long, Long>>\n                testHarness = createTestHarness(operator);\n\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> expected = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 1000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1999));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1999));\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 2000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(4998));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(4998));\n\n        // this will not be sideoutput because the session we're adding two has maxTimestamp\n        // after the current watermark\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 4500));\n\n        // new session\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 8500));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(7400));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(7400));\n\n        // this will merge the two sessions into one\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 7000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(11501));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-5\", 1000L, 11500L), 11499));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(11501));\n\n        // new session\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 11600));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(14600));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-1\", 11600L, 14600L), 14599));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(14600));\n\n        // because of the small allowed lateness and because the trigger is accumulating\n        // this will be merged into the session (11600-14600) and therefore will not\n        // be sideoutput as late\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 10000));\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 14500));\n\n        // adding (\"key2\", 1) extended the session to (10000-146000) for which\n        // maxTimestamp <= currentWatermark. Therefore, we immediately get a firing\n        // with the current version of EventTimeTrigger/EventTimeTriggerAccum\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-2\", 10000L, 14600L), 14599));\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> actual = testHarness.getOutput();\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<StreamRecord<Tuple2<String, Integer>>> sideActual =\n                testHarness.getSideOutput(lateOutputTag);\n\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\", expected, actual, new Tuple3ResultSortComparator());\n        assertThat(sideActual).isNull();\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(20000));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-3\", 10000L, 17500L), 17499));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(20000));\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(100000));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(100000));\n\n        actual = testHarness.getOutput();\n        sideActual = testHarness.getSideOutput(lateOutputTag);\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\", expected, actual, new Tuple3ResultSortComparator());\n        assertThat(sideActual).isNull();\n\n        testHarness.close();\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void testNotSideOutputDueToLatenessSessionWithHugeLatenessPurgingTrigger() throws Exception {\n\n        final int gapSize = 3;\n        final long lateness = 10000;\n\n        ReducingStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> stateDesc =\n                new ReducingStateDescriptor<>(\n                        \"window-contents\",\n                        new SumReducer(),\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Tuple3<String, Long, Long>,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                EventTimeSessionWindows.withGap(Duration.ofSeconds(gapSize)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                stateDesc,\n                                new InternalSingleValueWindowFunction<>(\n                                        new ReducedSessionWindowFunction()),\n                                PurgingTrigger.of(EventTimeTrigger.create()),\n                                lateness,\n                                lateOutputTag /* late data output tag */);\n\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple3<String, Long, Long>>\n                testHarness = createTestHarness(operator);\n\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> expected = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 1000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1999));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1999));\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 2000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(4998));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(4998));\n\n        // this will not be sideoutput because the session we're adding two has maxTimestamp\n        // after the current watermark\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 4500));\n\n        // new session\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 8500));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(7400));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(7400));\n\n        // this will merge the two sessions into one\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 7000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(11501));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-5\", 1000L, 11500L), 11499));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(11501));\n\n        // new session\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 11600));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(14600));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-1\", 11600L, 14600L), 14599));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(14600));\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 10000));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-1\", 1000L, 14600L), 14599));\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> actual = testHarness.getOutput();\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<StreamRecord<Tuple2<String, Integer>>> sideActual =\n                testHarness.getSideOutput(lateOutputTag);\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\", expected, actual, new Tuple3ResultSortComparator());\n        assertThat(sideActual).isNull();\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 14500));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(20000));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-1\", 1000L, 17500L), 17499));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(20000));\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(100000));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(100000));\n\n        actual = testHarness.getOutput();\n        sideActual = testHarness.getSideOutput(lateOutputTag);\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\", expected, actual, new Tuple3ResultSortComparator());\n        assertThat(sideActual).isNull();\n\n        testHarness.close();\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void testNotSideOutputDueToLatenessSessionWithHugeLateness() throws Exception {\n        final int gapSize = 3;\n        final long lateness = 10000;\n\n        ReducingStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> stateDesc =\n                new ReducingStateDescriptor<>(\n                        \"window-contents\",\n                        new SumReducer(),\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Tuple3<String, Long, Long>,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                EventTimeSessionWindows.withGap(Duration.ofSeconds(gapSize)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                stateDesc,\n                                new InternalSingleValueWindowFunction<>(\n                                        new ReducedSessionWindowFunction()),\n                                EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                                lateness,\n                                lateOutputTag /* late data output tag */);\n\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple3<String, Long, Long>>\n                testHarness = createTestHarness(operator);\n\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> expected = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 1000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1999));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1999));\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 2000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(4998));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(4998));\n\n        // this will not be sideoutput because the session we're adding two has maxTimestamp\n        // after the current watermark\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 4500));\n\n        // new session\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 8500));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(7400));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(7400));\n\n        // this will merge the two sessions into one\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 7000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(11501));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-5\", 1000L, 11500L), 11499));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(11501));\n\n        // new session\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 11600));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(14600));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-1\", 11600L, 14600L), 14599));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(14600));\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 10000));\n\n        // the maxTimestamp of the merged session is already late,\n        // so we get an immediate firing\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-7\", 1000L, 14600L), 14599));\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> actual = testHarness.getOutput();\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<StreamRecord<Tuple2<String, Integer>>> sideActual =\n                testHarness.getSideOutput(lateOutputTag);\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\", expected, actual, new Tuple3ResultSortComparator());\n        assertThat(sideActual).isNull();\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 14500));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(20000));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-8\", 1000L, 17500L), 17499));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(20000));\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(100000));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(100000));\n\n        actual = testHarness.getOutput();\n        sideActual = testHarness.getSideOutput(lateOutputTag);\n\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\", expected, actual, new Tuple3ResultSortComparator());\n        assertThat(sideActual).isNull();\n\n        testHarness.close();\n    }\n\n    @ParameterizedTest(name = \"Enable async state = {0}\")\n    @ValueSource(booleans = {false, true})\n    void testCleanupTimerWithEmptyListStateForTumblingWindows2(boolean enableAsyncState)\n            throws Exception {\n        final int windowSize = 2;\n        final long lateness = 100;\n\n        ListStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> windowStateDesc =\n                new ListStateDescriptor<>(\n                        \"window-contents\",\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>>,\n                        String,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                TumblingEventTimeWindows.of(Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                windowStateDesc,\n                                new InternalIterableWindowFunction<>(new PassThroughFunction2()),\n                                new EventTimeTriggerAccumGC(lateness),\n                                lateness,\n                                null /* late data output tag */);\n\n        WindowOperatorBuilder<Tuple2<String, Integer>, String, TimeWindow> builder =\n                new WindowOperatorBuilder<>(\n                        TumblingEventTimeWindows.of(Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize)),\n                        new EventTimeTriggerAccumGC(lateness),\n                        new ExecutionConfig(),\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE,\n                        new TupleKeySelector(),\n                        TypeInformation.of(String.class));\n        builder.allowedLateness(Duration.ofMillis(lateness));\n\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, String> testHarness =\n                enableAsyncState\n                        ? createAsyncTestHarness(builder.asyncApply(new PassThroughFunction2()))\n                        : createTestHarness(operator);\n\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> expected = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n\n        // normal element\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 1000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1599));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1999));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(2100));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(5000));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1599));\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(\"GOT: (key2,1)\", 1999));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1999)); // here it fires and purges\n        expected.add(new Watermark(2100)); // here is the cleanup timer\n        expected.add(new Watermark(5000));\n\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expected,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n        testHarness.close();\n    }\n\n    private static class PassThroughFunction2\n            implements WindowFunction<Tuple2<String, Integer>, String, String, TimeWindow> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public void apply(\n                String k,\n                TimeWindow window,\n                Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>> input,\n                Collector<String> out)\n                throws Exception {\n            out.collect(\"GOT: \" + Joiner.on(\",\").join(input));\n        }\n    }\n\n    @ParameterizedTest(name = \"Enable async state = {0}\")\n    @ValueSource(booleans = {false, true})\n    void testCleanupTimerWithEmptyListStateForTumblingWindows(boolean enableAsyncState)\n            throws Exception {\n        final int windowSize = 2;\n        final long lateness = 1;\n\n        ListStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> windowStateDesc =\n                new ListStateDescriptor<>(\n                        \"window-contents\",\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                TumblingEventTimeWindows.of(Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                windowStateDesc,\n                                new InternalIterableWindowFunction<>(new PassThroughFunction()),\n                                EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                                lateness,\n                                null /* late data output tag */);\n\n        WindowOperatorBuilder<Tuple2<String, Integer>, String, TimeWindow> builder =\n                new WindowOperatorBuilder<>(\n                        TumblingEventTimeWindows.of(Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize)),\n                        EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                        new ExecutionConfig(),\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE,\n                        new TupleKeySelector(),\n                        TypeInformation.of(String.class));\n        builder.allowedLateness(Duration.ofMillis(lateness));\n\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple2<String, Integer>>\n                testHarness =\n                        enableAsyncState\n                                ? createAsyncTestHarness(\n                                        builder.asyncApply(new PassThroughFunction()))\n                                : createTestHarness(operator);\n\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> expected = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n\n        // normal element\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 1000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1599));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1999));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(2000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(5000));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1599));\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 1999));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1999)); // here it fires and purges\n        expected.add(new Watermark(2000)); // here is the cleanup timer\n        expected.add(new Watermark(5000));\n\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expected,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n        testHarness.close();\n    }\n\n    @ParameterizedTest(name = \"Enable async state = {0}\")\n    @ValueSource(booleans = {false, true})\n    void testCleanupTimerWithEmptyReduceStateForTumblingWindows(boolean enableAsyncState)\n            throws Exception {\n        final int windowSize = 2;\n        final long lateness = 1;\n\n        ReducingStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> stateDesc =\n                new ReducingStateDescriptor<>(\n                        \"window-contents\",\n                        new SumReducer(),\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                TumblingEventTimeWindows.of(Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                stateDesc,\n                                new InternalSingleValueWindowFunction<>(\n                                        new PassThroughWindowFunction<\n                                                String, TimeWindow, Tuple2<String, Integer>>()),\n                                EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                                lateness,\n                                null /* late data output tag */);\n\n        WindowOperatorBuilder<Tuple2<String, Integer>, String, TimeWindow> builder =\n                new WindowOperatorBuilder<>(\n                        TumblingEventTimeWindows.of(Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize)),\n                        EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                        new ExecutionConfig(),\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE,\n                        new TupleKeySelector(),\n                        TypeInformation.of(String.class));\n        builder.allowedLateness(Duration.ofMillis(lateness));\n\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple2<String, Integer>>\n                testHarness =\n                        enableAsyncState\n                                ? createAsyncTestHarness(\n                                        builder.asyncReduce(\n                                                new SumReducer(),\n                                                new PassThroughWindowFunction<>()))\n                                : createTestHarness(operator);\n\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> expected = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n\n        // normal element\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 1000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1599));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1999));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(2000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(5000));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1599));\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 1999));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1999)); // here it fires and purges\n        expected.add(new Watermark(2000)); // here is the cleanup timer\n        expected.add(new Watermark(5000));\n\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expected,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n        testHarness.close();\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void testCleanupTimerWithEmptyListStateForSessionWindows() throws Exception {\n        final int gapSize = 3;\n        final long lateness = 10;\n\n        ListStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> windowStateDesc =\n                new ListStateDescriptor<>(\n                        \"window-contents\",\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                EventTimeSessionWindows.withGap(Duration.ofSeconds(gapSize)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                windowStateDesc,\n                                new InternalIterableWindowFunction<>(new PassThroughFunction()),\n                                EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                                lateness,\n                                null /* late data output tag */);\n\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple2<String, Integer>>\n                testHarness = createTestHarness(operator);\n\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> expected = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 1000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(4998));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 3999));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(4998));\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(14600));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(14600));\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> actual = testHarness.getOutput();\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\", expected, actual, new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n        testHarness.close();\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void testCleanupTimerWithEmptyReduceStateForSessionWindows() throws Exception {\n\n        final int gapSize = 3;\n        final long lateness = 10;\n\n        ReducingStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> stateDesc =\n                new ReducingStateDescriptor<>(\n                        \"window-contents\",\n                        new SumReducer(),\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Tuple3<String, Long, Long>,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                EventTimeSessionWindows.withGap(Duration.ofSeconds(gapSize)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                stateDesc,\n                                new InternalSingleValueWindowFunction<>(\n                                        new ReducedSessionWindowFunction()),\n                                EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                                lateness,\n                                null /* late data output tag */);\n\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple3<String, Long, Long>>\n                testHarness = createTestHarness(operator);\n\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> expected = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 1000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(4998));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-1\", 1000L, 4000L), 3999));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(4998));\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(14600));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(14600));\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> actual = testHarness.getOutput();\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\", expected, actual, new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n        testHarness.close();\n    }\n\n    @ParameterizedTest(name = \"Enable async state = {0}\")\n    @ValueSource(booleans = {false, true})\n    void testCleanupTimerWithEmptyStateNoResultForTumblingWindows(boolean enableAsyncState)\n            throws Exception {\n        final int windowSize = 2;\n        final long lateness = 1;\n\n        ListStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> windowStateDesc =\n                new ListStateDescriptor<>(\n                        \"window-contents\",\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n        org.apache.flink.api.common.state.v2.ListStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>>\n                windowStateDescV2 =\n                        new org.apache.flink.api.common.state.v2.ListStateDescriptor<>(\n                                \"window-contents\",\n                                STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                TumblingEventTimeWindows.of(Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                windowStateDesc,\n                                new InternalIterableWindowFunction<>(new EmptyReturnFunction()),\n                                new FireEverytimeOnElementAndEventTimeTrigger(),\n                                lateness,\n                                null /* late data output tag */);\n\n        WindowOperatorBuilder<Tuple2<String, Integer>, String, TimeWindow> builder =\n                new WindowOperatorBuilder<>(\n                        TumblingEventTimeWindows.of(Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize)),\n                        new FireEverytimeOnElementAndEventTimeTrigger(),\n                        new ExecutionConfig(),\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE,\n                        new TupleKeySelector(),\n                        TypeInformation.of(String.class));\n        builder.allowedLateness(Duration.ofMillis(lateness));\n\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple2<String, Integer>>\n                testHarness =\n                        enableAsyncState\n                                ? createAsyncTestHarness(\n                                        builder.asyncApply(new EmptyReturnFunction()))\n                                : createTestHarness(operator);\n\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> expected = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n        // normal element\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"test_key\", 1), 1000));\n        if (enableAsyncState) {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((AsyncWindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .getProcessContext()\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDescV2)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        } else {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((WindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .processContext\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDesc)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        }\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1599));\n        if (enableAsyncState) {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((AsyncWindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .getProcessContext()\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDescV2)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        } else {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((WindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .processContext\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDesc)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        }\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1699));\n        if (enableAsyncState) {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((AsyncWindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .getProcessContext()\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDescV2)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        } else {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((WindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .processContext\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDesc)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        }\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1799));\n        if (enableAsyncState) {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((AsyncWindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .getProcessContext()\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDescV2)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        } else {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((WindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .processContext\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDesc)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        }\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1999));\n        if (enableAsyncState) {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((AsyncWindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .getProcessContext()\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDescV2)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        } else {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((WindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .processContext\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDesc)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        }\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(2000));\n        if (enableAsyncState) {\n            // Be empty => list.get() is null\n            assertThat(\n                            ((AsyncWindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .getProcessContext()\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDescV2)\n                                    .get())\n                    .isNull();\n        } else {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((WindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .processContext\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDesc)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[]\");\n        }\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(5000));\n        if (enableAsyncState) {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((AsyncWindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .getProcessContext()\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDescV2)\n                                    .get())\n                    .isNull();\n        } else {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((WindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .processContext\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDesc)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[]\");\n        }\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1599));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1699));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1799));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1999)); // here it fires and purges\n        expected.add(new Watermark(2000)); // here is the cleanup timer\n        expected.add(new Watermark(5000));\n\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expected,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n        testHarness.close();\n    }\n\n    // ------------------------------------------------------------------------\n    //  UDFs\n    // ------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    private static class PassThroughFunction\n            implements WindowFunction<\n                    Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple2<String, Integer>, String, TimeWindow> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public void apply(\n                String k,\n                TimeWindow window,\n                Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>> input,\n                Collector<Tuple2<String, Integer>> out)\n                throws Exception {\n            for (Tuple2<String, Integer> in : input) {\n                out.collect(in);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class EmptyReturnFunction\n            implements WindowFunction<\n                    Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple2<String, Integer>, String, TimeWindow> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public void apply(\n                String k,\n                TimeWindow window,\n                Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>> input,\n                Collector<Tuple2<String, Integer>> out)\n                throws Exception {}\n    }\n\n    private static class SumReducer implements ReduceFunction<Tuple2<String, Integer>> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public Tuple2<String, Integer> reduce(\n                Tuple2<String, Integer> value1, Tuple2<String, Integer> value2) throws Exception {\n            return new Tuple2<>(value2.f0, value1.f1 + value2.f1);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class RichSumReducer<W extends Window>\n            extends RichWindowFunction<\n                    Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple2<String, Integer>, String, W> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        private boolean openCalled = false;\n\n        @Override\n        public void open(OpenContext openContext) throws Exception {\n            super.open(openContext);\n            openCalled = true;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public void close() throws Exception {\n            super.close();\n            closeCalled.incrementAndGet();\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public void apply(\n                String key,\n                W window,\n                Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>> input,\n                Collector<Tuple2<String, Integer>> out)\n                throws Exception {\n\n            assertThat(openCalled).as(\"Open was not called\").isTrue();\n\n            int sum = 0;\n\n            for (Tuple2<String, Integer> t : input) {\n                sum += t.f1;\n            }\n            out.collect(new Tuple2<>(key, sum));\n        }\n    }\n\n    @SuppressWarnings(\"unchecked\")\n    private static class Tuple2ResultSortComparator implements Comparator<Object>, Serializable {\n        @Override\n        public int compare(Object o1, Object o2) {\n            if (o1 instanceof Watermark || o2 instanceof Watermark) {\n                return 0;\n            } else {\n                StreamRecord<Tuple2<String, Integer>> sr0 =\n                        (StreamRecord<Tuple2<String, Integer>>) o1;\n                StreamRecord<Tuple2<String, Integer>> sr1 =\n                        (StreamRecord<Tuple2<String, Integer>>) o2;\n                if (sr0.getTimestamp() != sr1.getTimestamp()) {\n                    return (int) (sr0.getTimestamp() - sr1.getTimestamp());\n                }\n                int comparison = sr0.getValue().f0.compareTo(sr1.getValue().f0);\n                if (comparison != 0) {\n                    return comparison;\n                } else {\n                    return sr0.getValue().f1 - sr1.getValue().f1;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    @SuppressWarnings(\"unchecked\")\n    private static class Tuple3ResultSortComparator implements Comparator<Object>, Serializable {\n        @Override\n        public int compare(Object o1, Object o2) {\n            if (o1 instanceof Watermark || o2 instanceof Watermark) {\n                return 0;\n            } else {\n                StreamRecord<Tuple3<String, Long, Long>> sr0 =\n                        (StreamRecord<Tuple3<String, Long, Long>>) o1;\n                StreamRecord<Tuple3<String, Long, Long>> sr1 =\n                        (StreamRecord<Tuple3<String, Long, Long>>) o2;\n                if (sr0.getTimestamp() != sr1.getTimestamp()) {\n                    return (int) (sr0.getTimestamp() - sr1.getTimestamp());\n                }\n                int comparison = sr0.getValue().f0.compareTo(sr1.getValue().f0);\n                if (comparison != 0) {\n                    return comparison;\n                } else {\n                    comparison = (int) (sr0.getValue().f1 - sr1.getValue().f1);\n                    if (comparison != 0) {\n                        return comparison;\n                    }\n                    return (int) (sr0.getValue().f2 - sr1.getValue().f2);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class TupleKeySelector implements KeySelector<Tuple2<String, Integer>, String> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public String getKey(Tuple2<String, Integer> value) throws Exception {\n            return value.f0;\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class SessionWindowFunction\n            implements WindowFunction<\n                    Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple3<String, Long, Long>, String, TimeWindow> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public void apply(\n                String key,\n                TimeWindow window,\n                Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>> values,\n                Collector<Tuple3<String, Long, Long>> out)\n                throws Exception {\n            int sum = 0;\n            for (Tuple2<String, Integer> i : values) {\n                sum += i.f1;\n            }\n            String resultString = key + \"-\" + sum;\n            out.collect(new Tuple3<>(resultString, window.getStart(), window.getEnd()));\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class ReducedSessionWindowFunction\n            implements WindowFunction<\n                    Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple3<String, Long, Long>, String, TimeWindow> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public void apply(\n                String key,\n                TimeWindow window,\n                Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>> values,\n                Collector<Tuple3<String, Long, Long>> out)\n                throws Exception {\n            for (Tuple2<String, Integer> val : values) {\n                out.collect(new Tuple3<>(key + \"-\" + val.f1, window.getStart(), window.getEnd()));\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class SessionProcessWindowFunction\n            extends ProcessWindowFunction<\n                    Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple3<String, Long, Long>, String, TimeWindow> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public void process(\n                String key,\n                Context context,\n                Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>> values,\n                Collector<Tuple3<String, Long, Long>> out)\n                throws Exception {\n            int sum = 0;\n            for (Tuple2<String, Integer> i : values) {\n                sum += i.f1;\n            }\n            String resultString = key + \"-\" + sum;\n            TimeWindow window = context.window();\n            out.collect(new Tuple3<>(resultString, window.getStart(), window.getEnd()));\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class ReducedProcessSessionWindowFunction\n            extends ProcessWindowFunction<\n                    Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple3<String, Long, Long>, String, TimeWindow> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public void process(\n                String key,\n                Context context,\n                Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>> values,\n                Collector<Tuple3<String, Long, Long>> out)\n                throws Exception {\n            TimeWindow window = context.window();\n            for (Tuple2<String, Integer> val : values) {\n                out.collect(new Tuple3<>(key + \"-\" + val.f1, window.getStart(), window.getEnd()));\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class PointSessionWindows extends EventTimeSessionWindows {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        private PointSessionWindows(long sessionTimeout) {\n            super(sessionTimeout);\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        @SuppressWarnings(\"unchecked\")\n        public Collection<TimeWindow> assignWindows(\n                Object element, long timestamp, WindowAssignerContext ctx) {\n            if (element instanceof Tuple2) {\n                Tuple2<String, Integer> t2 = (Tuple2<String, Integer>) element;\n                if (t2.f1 == 33) {\n                    return Collections.singletonList(new TimeWindow(timestamp, timestamp));\n                }\n            }\n            return Collections.singletonList(new TimeWindow(timestamp, timestamp + sessionTimeout));\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * A trigger that fires at the end of the window but does not purge the state of the fired\n     * window. This is to test the state garbage collection mechanism.\n     */\n    private static class EventTimeTriggerAccumGC extends Trigger<Object, TimeWindow> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        private long cleanupTime;\n\n        public EventTimeTriggerAccumGC(long cleanupTime) {\n            this.cleanupTime = cleanupTime;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public TriggerResult onElement(\n                Object element, long timestamp, TimeWindow window, TriggerContext ctx)\n                throws Exception {\n            if (window.maxTimestamp() <= ctx.getCurrentWatermark()) {\n                // if the watermark is already past the window fire immediately\n                return TriggerResult.FIRE;\n            } else {\n                ctx.registerEventTimeTimer(window.maxTimestamp());\n                return TriggerResult.CONTINUE;\n            }\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public TriggerResult onEventTime(long time, TimeWindow window, TriggerContext ctx) {\n            return time == window.maxTimestamp() || time == window.maxTimestamp() + cleanupTime\n                    ? TriggerResult.FIRE_AND_PURGE\n                    : TriggerResult.CONTINUE;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public TriggerResult onProcessingTime(long time, TimeWindow window, TriggerContext ctx)\n                throws Exception {\n            return TriggerResult.CONTINUE;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public void clear(TimeWindow window, TriggerContext ctx) throws Exception {\n            ctx.deleteEventTimeTimer(window.maxTimestamp());\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public boolean canMerge() {\n            return true;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public void onMerge(TimeWindow window, OnMergeContext ctx) {\n            ctx.registerEventTimeTimer(window.maxTimestamp());\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public String toString() {\n            return \"EventTimeTrigger()\";\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class FireEverytimeOnElementAndEventTimeTrigger\n            extends Trigger<Tuple2<String, Integer>, TimeWindow> {\n        @Override\n        public TriggerResult onElement(\n                Tuple2<String, Integer> element,\n                long timestamp,\n                TimeWindow window,\n                TriggerContext ctx)\n                throws Exception {\n            return TriggerResult.FIRE;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public TriggerResult onProcessingTime(long time, TimeWindow window, TriggerContext ctx)\n                throws Exception {\n            return TriggerResult.FIRE;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public TriggerResult onEventTime(long time, TimeWindow window, TriggerContext ctx)\n                throws Exception {\n            return TriggerResult.FIRE;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public void clear(TimeWindow window, TriggerContext ctx) throws Exception {}\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void testSessionWindowsWithLateDataSideOutput() throws Exception {\n        final int sessionGap = 3;\n        final long allowedLateness = 0;\n\n        ListStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> stateDesc =\n                new ListStateDescriptor<>(\n                        \"window-contents\",\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                EventTimeSessionWindows.withGap(Duration.ofSeconds(sessionGap)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                stateDesc,\n                                new InternalIterableWindowFunction<>(\n                                        new PassThroughWindowFunction<\n                                                String, TimeWindow, Tuple2<String, Integer>>()),\n                                EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                                allowedLateness,\n                                lateOutputTag);\n\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple2<String, Integer>>\n                testHarness = createTestHarness(operator);\n\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> expected = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> lateExpected = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n\n        // Create first element in session window [100, 103)\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 1), 100));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(102));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(102));\n\n        // Create second element that merges into [100, 105)\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 2), 102));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(104));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(104));\n\n        // Advance watermark past the session window end, making the window late\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(106));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(106));\n\n        // Now send a late element that should be side-outputted\n        // This element would extend the window [100, 105) to [100, 108),\n        // but since it's late, it should be sent to side output\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 3), 104));\n\n        lateExpected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 3), 104));\n\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expected,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"SideOutput was not correct.\",\n                lateExpected,\n                (Iterable) testHarness.getSideOutput(lateOutputTag),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n\n        testHarness.close();\n    }\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "     @Test",
        "     void testSessionWindowsWithLateDataSideOutput() throws Exception {",
        "         final int sessionGap = 3;",
        "-        final long allowedLateness = 0;",
        "+        final long allowedLateness = 5;",
        " ",
        "         ListStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> stateDesc =",
        "                 new ListStateDescriptor<>("
      ],
      "newLines": 7,
      "newStart": 3975,
      "oldLines": 7,
      "oldStart": 3975
    },
    {
      "lines": [
        " ",
        "         expected.add(new Watermark(102));",
        " ",
        "-        // Create second element that merges into [100, 105)",
        "-        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 2), 102));",
        "-        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(104));",
        "+        // Advance watermark past the window + allowed lateness, making the window closed",
        "+        // Window [100, 103) with allowedLateness=5, cleanup time = 103+5 = 108",
        "+        // Watermark 108 makes window closed",
        "+        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(108));",
        "+        expected.add(new Watermark(108));",
        " ",
        "-        expected.add(new Watermark(104));",
        "-",
        "-        // Advance watermark past the session window end, making the window late",
        "-        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(106));",
        "-        expected.add(new Watermark(106));",
        "-",
        "         // Now send a late element that should be side-outputted",
        "-        // This element would extend the window [100, 105) to [100, 108),",
        "-        // but since it's late, it should be sent to side output",
        "-        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 3), 104));",
        "+        // Element at timestamp 101 would create window [101, 104)",
        "+        // which merges with [100, 103) to create [100, 104)",
        "+        // [100, 104) + allowedLateness=5 -> cleanup time = 109",
        "+        // But watermark is 108, so window is NOT late yet - should be accepted",
        " ",
        "-        lateExpected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 3), 104));",
        "+        // Send an element even later that is past allowedLateness",
        "+        // Element at timestamp 99 creates [99, 102)",
        "+        // [99, 102) has cleanup time 99+5 = 104",
        "+        // With watermark 108, this is definitely late",
        "+        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 2), 99));",
        " ",
        "+        lateExpected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 2), 99));",

        "                 \"Output was not correct.\",",
        "                 expected,"

    }

See the NOTICE file\n * distributed with this work for additional information\n * regarding copyright ownership.  The ASF licenses this file\n * to you under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the\n * \"License\"); you may not use this file except in compliance\n * with the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at\n *\n * http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n *\n * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n * distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n * limitations under the License.\n */\n\npackage org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.assigners;\n\nimport org.apache.flink.annotation.PublicEvolving;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.windows.Window;\n\nimport java.util.Collection;\n\n/**\n * A {@code WindowAssigner} that can merge windows.\n *\n * @param <T> The type of elements that this WindowAssigner can assign windows to.\n * @param <W> The type of {@code Window} that this assigner assigns.\n */\n@PublicEvolving\npublic abstract class MergingWindowAssigner<T, W extends Window> extends WindowAssigner<T, W> {\n    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n    /**\n     * Determines which windows (if any) should be merged.\n     *\n     * @param windows The window candidates.\n     * @param callback A callback that can be invoked to signal which windows should be merged.\n     */\n    public abstract void mergeWindows(Collection<W> windows, MergeCallback<W> callback);\n\n    /**\n     * Callback to be used in {@link #mergeWindows(Collection, MergeCallback)} for specifying which\n     * windows should be merged.\n     */\n    @PublicEvolving\n    public interface MergeCallback<W> {\n\n        /**\n         * Specifies that the given windows should be merged into the result window.\n         *\n         * @param toBeMerged The list of windows that should be merged into one window.\n         * @param mergeResult The resulting merged window.\n         */\n        void merge(Collection<W> toBeMerged, W mergeResult);\n    }\n}\n",

    "totalLines": 60
  },

42. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/flink-runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/flink/streaming/api/windowing/windows/TimeWindow.java",
  "limit": 70,
  "offset": 208
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "    public static void mergeWindows(\n            Collection<TimeWindow> windows, MergingWindowAssigner.MergeCallback<TimeWindow> c) {\n\n        // sort the windows by the start time and then merge overlapping windows\n\n        List<TimeWindow> sortedWindows = new ArrayList<>(windows);\n\n        Collections.sort(\n                sortedWindows,\n                new Comparator<TimeWindow>() {\n                    @Override\n                    public int compare(TimeWindow o1, TimeWindow o2) {\n                        return Long.compare(o1.getStart(), o2.getStart());\n                    }\n                });\n\n        List<Tuple2<TimeWindow, Set<TimeWindow>>> merged = new ArrayList<>();\n        Tuple2<TimeWindow, Set<TimeWindow>> currentMerge = null;\n\n        for (TimeWindow candidate : sortedWindows) {\n            if (currentMerge == null) {\n                currentMerge = new Tuple2<>();\n                currentMerge.f0 = candidate;\n                currentMerge.f1 = new HashSet<>();\n                currentMerge.f1.add(candidate);\n            } else if (currentMerge.f0.intersects(candidate)) {\n                currentMerge.f0 = currentMerge.f0.cover(candidate);\n                currentMerge.f1.add(candidate);\n            } else {\n                merged.add(currentMerge);\n                currentMerge = new Tuple2<>();\n                currentMerge.f0 = candidate;\n                currentMerge.f1 = new HashSet<>();\n                currentMerge.f1.add(candidate);\n            }\n        }\n\n        if (currentMerge != null) {\n            merged.add(currentMerge);\n        }\n\n        for (Tuple2<TimeWindow, Set<TimeWindow>> m : merged) {\n            if (m.f1.size() > 1) {\n                c.merge(m.f1, m.f0);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Method to get the window start for a timestamp.\n     *\n     * @param timestamp epoch millisecond to get the window start.\n     * @param offset The offset which window start would be shifted by.\n     * @param windowSize The size of the generated windows.\n     * @return window start\n     */\n    public static long getWindowStartWithOffset(long timestamp, long offset, long windowSize) {\n        final long remainder = (timestamp - offset) % windowSize;\n        // handle both positive and negative cases\n        if (remainder < 0) {\n            return timestamp - (remainder + windowSize);\n        } else {\n            return timestamp - remainder;\n        }\n    }\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/flink-runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/flink/streaming/api/windowing/windows/TimeWindow.java",
    "numLines": 67,
    "startLine": 208,
    "totalLines": 274
  },
  "type": "text"
}

Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "    public W addWindow(W newWindow, MergeFunction<W> mergeFunction) throws Exception {\n\n        List<W> windows = new ArrayList<>();\n\n        windows.addAll(this.mapping.keySet());\n        windows.add(newWindow);\n\n        final Map<W, Collection<W>> mergeResults = new HashMap<>();\n        windowAssigner.mergeWindows(\n                windows,\n                new MergingWindowAssigner.MergeCallback<W>() {\n                    @Override\n                    public void merge(Collection<W> toBeMerged, W mergeResult) {\n                        if (LOG.isDebugEnabled()) {\n                            LOG.debug(\"Merging {} into {}\", toBeMerged, mergeResult);\n                        }\n                        mergeResults.put(mergeResult, toBeMerged);\n                    }\n                });\n\n        W resultWindow = newWindow;\n        boolean mergedNewWindow = false;\n\n        // perform the merge\n        for (Map.Entry<W, Collection<W>> c : mergeResults.entrySet()) {\n            W mergeResult = c.getKey();\n            Collection<W> mergedWindows = c.getValue();\n\n            // if our new window is in the merged windows make the merge result the\n            // result window\n            if (mergedWindows.remove(newWindow)) {\n                mergedNewWindow = true;\n                resultWindow = mergeResult;\n            }\n\n            // pick any of the merged windows and choose that window's state window\n            // as the state window for the merge result\n            W mergedStateWindow = this.mapping.get(mergedWindows.iterator().next());\n\n            // figure out the state windows that we are merging\n            List<W> mergedStateWindows = new ArrayList<>();\n            for (W mergedWindow : mergedWindows) {\n                W res = this.mapping.remove(mergedWindow);\n                if (res != null) {\n                    mergedStateWindows.add(res);\n                }\n            }\n\n            this.mapping.put(mergeResult, mergedStateWindow);\n\n            // don't put the target state window into the merged windows\n            mergedStateWindows.remove(mergedStateWindow);\n\n            // don't merge the new window itself, it never had any state associated with it\n            // i.e. if we are only merging one pre-existing window into itself\n            // without extending the pre-existing window\n            if (!(mergedWindows.contains(mergeResult) && mergedWindows.size() == 1)) {\n                mergeFunction.merge(\n                        mergeResult,\n                        mergedWindows,\n                        this.mapping.get(mergeResult),\n                        mergedStateWindows);\n            }\n        }\n\n        // the new window created a new, self-contained window without merging\n        if (mergeResults.isEmpty() || (resultWindow.equals(newWindow) && !mergedNewWindow)) {\n            this.mapping.put(resultWindow, resultWindow);\n        }\n\n        return resultWindow;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Callback for {@link #addWindow(Window, MergeFunction)}.\n     *\n     * @param <W>\n     */\n    public interface MergeFunction<W> {\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/flink-runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/flink/streaming/runtime/operators/windowing/MergingWindowSet.java",
