 // after the current watermark\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 4500));\n\n        // new session\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 8500));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(7400));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(7400));\n\n        // this will merge the two sessions into one\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 7000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(11501));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-5\", 1000L, 11500L), 11499));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(11501));\n\n        // new session\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 11600));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(14600));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-1\", 11600L, 14600L), 14599));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(14600));\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 10000));\n\n        // the maxTimestamp of the merged session is already late,\n        // so we get an immediate firing\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-7\", 1000L, 14600L), 14599));\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> actual = testHarness.getOutput();\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<StreamRecord<Tuple2<String, Integer>>> sideActual =\n                testHarness.getSideOutput(lateOutputTag);\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\", expected, actual, new Tuple3ResultSortComparator());\n        assertThat(sideActual).isNull();\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 14500));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(20000));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-8\", 1000L, 17500L), 17499));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(20000));\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(100000));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(100000));\n\n        actual = testHarness.getOutput();\n        sideActual = testHarness.getSideOutput(lateOutputTag);\n\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\", expected, actual, new Tuple3ResultSortComparator());\n        assertThat(sideActual).isNull();\n\n        testHarness.close();\n    }\n\n    @ParameterizedTest(name = \"Enable async state = {0}\")\n    @ValueSource(booleans = {false, true})\n    void testCleanupTimerWithEmptyListStateForTumblingWindows2(boolean enableAsyncState)\n            throws Exception {\n        final int windowSize = 2;\n        final long lateness = 100;\n\n        ListStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> windowStateDesc =\n                new ListStateDescriptor<>(\n                        \"window-contents\",\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>>,\n                        String,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                TumblingEventTimeWindows.of(Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                windowStateDesc,\n                                new InternalIterableWindowFunction<>(new PassThroughFunction2()),\n                                new EventTimeTriggerAccumGC(lateness),\n                                lateness,\n                                null /* late data output tag */);\n\n        WindowOperatorBuilder<Tuple2<String, Integer>, String, TimeWindow> builder =\n                new WindowOperatorBuilder<>(\n                        TumblingEventTimeWindows.of(Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize)),\n                        new EventTimeTriggerAccumGC(lateness),\n                        new ExecutionConfig(),\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE,\n                        new TupleKeySelector(),\n                        TypeInformation.of(String.class));\n        builder.allowedLateness(Duration.ofMillis(lateness));\n\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, String> testHarness =\n                enableAsyncState\n                        ? createAsyncTestHarness(builder.asyncApply(new PassThroughFunction2()))\n                        : createTestHarness(operator);\n\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> expected = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n\n        // normal element\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 1000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1599));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1999));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(2100));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(5000));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1599));\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(\"GOT: (key2,1)\", 1999));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1999)); // here it fires and purges\n        expected.add(new Watermark(2100)); // here is the cleanup timer\n        expected.add(new Watermark(5000));\n\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expected,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n        testHarness.close();\n    }\n\n    private static class PassThroughFunction2\n            implements WindowFunction<Tuple2<String, Integer>, String, String, TimeWindow> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public void apply(\n                String k,\n                TimeWindow window,\n                Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>> input,\n                Collector<String> out)\n                throws Exception {\n            out.collect(\"GOT: \" + Joiner.on(\",\").join(input));\n        }\n    }\n\n    @ParameterizedTest(name = \"Enable async state = {0}\")\n    @ValueSource(booleans = {false, true})\n    void testCleanupTimerWithEmptyListStateForTumblingWindows(boolean enableAsyncState)\n            throws Exception {\n        final int windowSize = 2;\n        final long lateness = 1;\n\n        ListStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> windowStateDesc =\n                new ListStateDescriptor<>(\n                        \"window-contents\",\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                TumblingEventTimeWindows.of(Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                windowStateDesc,\n                                new InternalIterableWindowFunction<>(new PassThroughFunction()),\n                                EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                                lateness,\n                                null /* late data output tag */);\n\n        WindowOperatorBuilder<Tuple2<String, Integer>, String, TimeWindow> builder =\n                new WindowOperatorBuilder<>(\n                        TumblingEventTimeWindows.of(Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize)),\n                        EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                        new ExecutionConfig(),\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE,\n                        new TupleKeySelector(),\n                        TypeInformation.of(String.class));\n        builder.allowedLateness(Duration.ofMillis(lateness));\n\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple2<String, Integer>>\n                testHarness =\n                        enableAsyncState\n                                ? createAsyncTestHarness(\n                                        builder.asyncApply(new PassThroughFunction()))\n                                : createTestHarness(operator);\n\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> expected = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n\n        // normal element\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 1000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1599));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1999));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(2000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(5000));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1599));\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 1999));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1999)); // here it fires and purges\n        expected.add(new Watermark(2000)); // here is the cleanup timer\n        expected.add(new Watermark(5000));\n\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expected,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n        testHarness.close();\n    }\n\n    @ParameterizedTest(name = \"Enable async state = {0}\")\n    @ValueSource(booleans = {false, true})\n    void testCleanupTimerWithEmptyReduceStateForTumblingWindows(boolean enableAsyncState)\n            throws Exception {\n        final int windowSize = 2;\n        final long lateness = 1;\n\n        ReducingStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> stateDesc =\n                new ReducingStateDescriptor<>(\n                        \"window-contents\",\n                        new SumReducer(),\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                TumblingEventTimeWindows.of(Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                stateDesc,\n                                new InternalSingleValueWindowFunction<>(\n                                        new PassThroughWindowFunction<\n                                                String, TimeWindow, Tuple2<String, Integer>>()),\n                                EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                                lateness,\n                                null /* late data output tag */);\n\n        WindowOperatorBuilder<Tuple2<String, Integer>, String, TimeWindow> builder =\n                new WindowOperatorBuilder<>(\n                        TumblingEventTimeWindows.of(Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize)),\n                        EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                        new ExecutionConfig(),\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE,\n                        new TupleKeySelector(),\n                        TypeInformation.of(String.class));\n        builder.allowedLateness(Duration.ofMillis(lateness));\n\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple2<String, Integer>>\n                testHarness =\n                        enableAsyncState\n                                ? createAsyncTestHarness(\n                                        builder.asyncReduce(\n                                                new SumReducer(),\n                                                new PassThroughWindowFunction<>()))\n                                : createTestHarness(operator);\n\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> expected = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n\n        // normal element\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 1000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1599));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1999));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(2000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(5000));\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1599));\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 1999));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1999)); // here it fires and purges\n        expected.add(new Watermark(2000)); // here is the cleanup timer\n        expected.add(new Watermark(5000));\n\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expected,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n        testHarness.close();\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void testCleanupTimerWithEmptyListStateForSessionWindows() throws Exception {\n        final int gapSize = 3;\n        final long lateness = 10;\n\n        ListStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> windowStateDesc =\n                new ListStateDescriptor<>(\n                        \"window-contents\",\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                EventTimeSessionWindows.withGap(Duration.ofSeconds(gapSize)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                windowStateDesc,\n                                new InternalIterableWindowFunction<>(new PassThroughFunction()),\n                                EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                                lateness,\n                                null /* late data output tag */);\n\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple2<String, Integer>>\n                testHarness = createTestHarness(operator);\n\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> expected = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 1000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(4998));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 3999));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(4998));\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(14600));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(14600));\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> actual = testHarness.getOutput();\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\", expected, actual, new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n        testHarness.close();\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void testCleanupTimerWithEmptyReduceStateForSessionWindows() throws Exception {\n\n        final int gapSize = 3;\n        final long lateness = 10;\n\n        ReducingStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> stateDesc =\n                new ReducingStateDescriptor<>(\n                        \"window-contents\",\n                        new SumReducer(),\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Tuple3<String, Long, Long>,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                EventTimeSessionWindows.withGap(Duration.ofSeconds(gapSize)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                stateDesc,\n                                new InternalSingleValueWindowFunction<>(\n                                        new ReducedSessionWindowFunction()),\n                                EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                                lateness,\n                                null /* late data output tag */);\n\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple3<String, Long, Long>>\n                testHarness = createTestHarness(operator);\n\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> expected = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 1000));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(4998));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-1\", 1000L, 4000L), 3999));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(4998));\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(14600));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(14600));\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> actual = testHarness.getOutput();\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\", expected, actual, new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n        testHarness.close();\n    }\n\n    @ParameterizedTest(name = \"Enable async state = {0}\")\n    @ValueSource(booleans = {false, true})\n    void testCleanupTimerWithEmptyStateNoResultForTumblingWindows(boolean enableAsyncState)\n            throws Exception {\n        final int windowSize = 2;\n        final long lateness = 1;\n\n        ListStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> windowStateDesc =\n                new ListStateDescriptor<>(\n                        \"window-contents\",\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n        org.apache.flink.api.common.state.v2.ListStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>>\n                windowStateDescV2 =\n                        new org.apache.flink.api.common.state.v2.ListStateDescriptor<>(\n                                \"window-contents\",\n                                STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                TumblingEventTimeWindows.of(Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                windowStateDesc,\n                                new InternalIterableWindowFunction<>(new EmptyReturnFunction()),\n                                new FireEverytimeOnElementAndEventTimeTrigger(),\n                                lateness,\n                                null /* late data output tag */);\n\n        WindowOperatorBuilder<Tuple2<String, Integer>, String, TimeWindow> builder =\n                new WindowOperatorBuilder<>(\n                        TumblingEventTimeWindows.of(Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize)),\n                        new FireEverytimeOnElementAndEventTimeTrigger(),\n                        new ExecutionConfig(),\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE,\n                        new TupleKeySelector(),\n                        TypeInformation.of(String.class));\n        builder.allowedLateness(Duration.ofMillis(lateness));\n\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple2<String, Integer>>\n                testHarness =\n                        enableAsyncState\n                                ? createAsyncTestHarness(\n                                        builder.asyncApply(new EmptyReturnFunction()))\n                                : createTestHarness(operator);\n\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> expected = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n        // normal element\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"test_key\", 1), 1000));\n        if (enableAsyncState) {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((AsyncWindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .getProcessContext()\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDescV2)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        } else {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((WindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .processContext\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDesc)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        }\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1599));\n        if (enableAsyncState) {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((AsyncWindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .getProcessContext()\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDescV2)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        } else {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((WindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .processContext\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDesc)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        }\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1699));\n        if (enableAsyncState) {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((AsyncWindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .getProcessContext()\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDescV2)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        } else {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((WindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .processContext\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDesc)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        }\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1799));\n        if (enableAsyncState) {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((AsyncWindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .getProcessContext()\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDescV2)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        } else {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((WindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .processContext\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDesc)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        }\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1999));\n        if (enableAsyncState) {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((AsyncWindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .getProcessContext()\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDescV2)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        } else {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((WindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .processContext\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDesc)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        }\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(2000));\n        if (enableAsyncState) {\n            // Be empty => list.get() is null\n            assertThat(\n                            ((AsyncWindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .getProcessContext()\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDescV2)\n                                    .get())\n                    .isNull();\n        } else {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((WindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .processContext\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDesc)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[]\");\n        }\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(5000));\n        if (enableAsyncState) {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((AsyncWindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .getProcessContext()\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDescV2)\n                                    .get())\n                    .isNull();\n        } else {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((WindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .processContext\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDesc)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[]\");\n        }\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1599));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1699));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1799));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1999)); // here it fires and purges\n        expected.add(new Watermark(2000)); // here is the cleanup timer\n        expected.add(new Watermark(5000));\n\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expected,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n        testHarness.close();\n    }\n\n    // ------------------------------------------------------------------------\n    //  UDFs\n    // ------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    private static class PassThroughFunction\n            implements WindowFunction<\n                    Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple2<String, Integer>, String, TimeWindow> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public void apply(\n                String k,\n                TimeWindow window,\n                Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>> input,\n                Collector<Tuple2<String, Integer>> out)\n                throws Exception {\n            for (Tuple2<String, Integer> in : input) {\n                out.collect(in);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class EmptyReturnFunction\n            implements WindowFunction<\n                    Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple2<String, Integer>, String, TimeWindow> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public void apply(\n                String k,\n                TimeWindow window,\n                Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>> input,\n                Collector<Tuple2<String, Integer>> out)\n                throws Exception {}\n    }\n\n    private static class SumReducer implements ReduceFunction<Tuple2<String, Integer>> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public Tuple2<String, Integer> reduce(\n                Tuple2<String, Integer> value1, Tuple2<String, Integer> value2) throws Exception {\n            return new Tuple2<>(value2.f0, value1.f1 + value2.f1);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class RichSumReducer<W extends Window>\n            extends RichWindowFunction<\n                    Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple2<String, Integer>, String, W> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        private boolean openCalled = false;\n\n        @Override\n        public void open(OpenContext openContext) throws Exception {\n            super.open(openContext);\n            openCalled = true;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public void close() throws Exception {\n            super.close();\n            closeCalled.incrementAndGet();\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public void apply(\n                String key,\n                W window,\n                Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>> input,\n                Collector<Tuple2<String, Integer>> out)\n                throws Exception {\n\n            assertThat(openCalled).as(\"Open was not called\").isTrue();\n\n            int sum = 0;\n\n            for (Tuple2<String, Integer> t : input) {\n                sum += t.f1;\n            }\n            out.collect(new Tuple2<>(key, sum));\n        }\n    }\n\n    @SuppressWarnings(\"unchecked\")\n    private static class Tuple2ResultSortComparator implements Comparator<Object>, Serializable {\n        @Override\n        public int compare(Object o1, Object o2) {\n            if (o1 instanceof Watermark || o2 instanceof Watermark) {\n                return 0;\n            } else {\n                StreamRecord<Tuple2<String, Integer>> sr0 =\n                        (StreamRecord<Tuple2<String, Integer>>) o1;\n                StreamRecord<Tuple2<String, Integer>> sr1 =\n                        (StreamRecord<Tuple2<String, Integer>>) o2;\n                if (sr0.getTimestamp() != sr1.getTimestamp()) {\n                    return (int) (sr0.getTimestamp() - sr1.getTimestamp());\n                }\n                int comparison = sr0.getValue().f0.compareTo(sr1.getValue().f0);\n                if (comparison != 0) {\n                    return comparison;\n                } else {\n                    return sr0.getValue().f1 - sr1.getValue().f1;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    @SuppressWarnings(\"unchecked\")\n    private static class Tuple3ResultSortComparator implements Comparator<Object>, Serializable {\n        @Override\n        public int compare(Object o1, Object o2) {\n            if (o1 instanceof Watermark || o2 instanceof Watermark) {\n                return 0;\n            } else {\n                StreamRecord<Tuple3<String, Long, Long>> sr0 =\n                        (StreamRecord<Tuple3<String, Long, Long>>) o1;\n                StreamRecord<Tuple3<String, Long, Long>> sr1 =\n                        (StreamRecord<Tuple3<String, Long, Long>>) o2;\n                if (sr0.getTimestamp() != sr1.getTimestamp()) {\n                    return (int) (sr0.getTimestamp() - sr1.getTimestamp());\n                }\n                int comparison = sr0.getValue().f0.compareTo(sr1.getValue().f0);\n                if (comparison != 0) {\n                    return comparison;\n                } else {\n                    comparison = (int) (sr0.getValue().f1 - sr1.getValue().f1);\n                    if (comparison != 0) {\n                        return comparison;\n                    }\n                    return (int) (sr0.getValue().f2 - sr1.getValue().f2);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class TupleKeySelector implements KeySelector<Tuple2<String, Integer>, String> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public String getKey(Tuple2<String, Integer> value) throws Exception {\n            return value.f0;\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class SessionWindowFunction\n            implements WindowFunction<\n                    Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple3<String, Long, Long>, String, TimeWindow> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public void apply(\n                String key,\n                TimeWindow window,\n                Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>> values,\n                Collector<Tuple3<String, Long, Long>> out)\n                throws Exception {\n            int sum = 0;\n            for (Tuple2<String, Integer> i : values) {\n                sum += i.f1;\n            }\n            String resultString = key + \"-\" + sum;\n            out.collect(new Tuple3<>(resultString, window.getStart(), window.getEnd()));\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class ReducedSessionWindowFunction\n            implements WindowFunction<\n                    Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple3<String, Long, Long>, String, TimeWindow> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public void apply(\n                String key,\n                TimeWindow window,\n                Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>> values,\n                Collector<Tuple3<String, Long, Long>> out)\n                throws Exception {\n            for (Tuple2<String, Integer> val : values) {\n                out.collect(new Tuple3<>(key + \"-\" + val.f1, window.getStart(), window.getEnd()));\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class SessionProcessWindowFunction\n            extends ProcessWindowFunction<\n                    Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple3<String, Long, Long>, String, TimeWindow> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public void process(\n                String key,\n                Context context,\n                Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>> values,\n                Collector<Tuple3<String, Long, Long>> out)\n                throws Exception {\n            int sum = 0;\n            for (Tuple2<String, Integer> i : values) {\n                sum += i.f1;\n            }\n            String resultString = key + \"-\" + sum;\n            TimeWindow window = context.window();\n            out.collect(new Tuple3<>(resultString, window.getStart(), window.getEnd()));\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class ReducedProcessSessionWindowFunction\n            extends ProcessWindowFunction<\n                    Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple3<String, Long, Long>, String, TimeWindow> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public void process(\n                String key,\n                Context context,\n                Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>> values,\n                Collector<Tuple3<String, Long, Long>> out)\n                throws Exception {\n            TimeWindow window = context.window();\n            for (Tuple2<String, Integer> val : values) {\n                out.collect(new Tuple3<>(key + \"-\" + val.f1, window.getStart(), window.getEnd()));\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class PointSessionWindows extends EventTimeSessionWindows {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        private PointSessionWindows(long sessionTimeout) {\n            super(sessionTimeout);\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        @SuppressWarnings(\"unchecked\")\n        public Collection<TimeWindow> assignWindows(\n                Object element, long timestamp, WindowAssignerContext ctx) {\n            if (element instanceof Tuple2) {\n                Tuple2<String, Integer> t2 = (Tuple2<String, Integer>) element;\n                if (t2.f1 == 33) {\n                    return Collections.singletonList(new TimeWindow(timestamp, timestamp));\n                }\n            }\n            return Collections.singletonList(new TimeWindow(timestamp, timestamp + sessionTimeout));\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * A trigger that fires at the end of the window but does not purge the state of the fired\n     * window. This is to test the state garbage collection mechanism.\n     */\n    private static class EventTimeTriggerAccumGC extends Trigger<Object, TimeWindow> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        private long cleanupTime;\n\n        public EventTimeTriggerAccumGC(long cleanupTime) {\n            this.cleanupTime = cleanupTime;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public TriggerResult onElement(\n                Object element, long timestamp, TimeWindow window, TriggerContext ctx)\n                throws Exception {\n            if (window.maxTimestamp() <= ctx.getCurrentWatermark()) {\n                // if the watermark is already past the window fire immediately\n                return TriggerResult.FIRE;\n            } else {\n                ctx.registerEventTimeTimer(window.maxTimestamp());\n                return TriggerResult.CONTINUE;\n            }\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public TriggerResult onEventTime(long time, TimeWindow window, TriggerContext ctx) {\n            return time == window.maxTimestamp() || time == window.maxTimestamp() + cleanupTime\n                    ? TriggerResult.FIRE_AND_PURGE\n                    : TriggerResult.CONTINUE;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public TriggerResult onProcessingTime(long time, TimeWindow window, TriggerContext ctx)\n                throws Exception {\n            return TriggerResult.CONTINUE;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public void clear(TimeWindow window, TriggerContext ctx) throws Exception {\n            ctx.deleteEventTimeTimer(window.maxTimestamp());\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public boolean canMerge() {\n            return true;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public void onMerge(TimeWindow window, OnMergeContext ctx) {\n            ctx.registerEventTimeTimer(window.maxTimestamp());\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public String toString() {\n            return \"EventTimeTrigger()\";\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class FireEverytimeOnElementAndEventTimeTrigger\n            extends Trigger<Tuple2<String, Integer>, TimeWindow> {\n        @Override\n        public TriggerResult onElement(\n                Tuple2<String, Integer> element,\n                long timestamp,\n                TimeWindow window,\n                TriggerContext ctx)\n                throws Exception {\n            return TriggerResult.FIRE;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public TriggerResult onProcessingTime(long time, TimeWindow window, TriggerContext ctx)\n                throws Exception {\n            return TriggerResult.FIRE;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public TriggerResult onEventTime(long time, TimeWindow window, TriggerContext ctx)\n                throws Exception {\n            return TriggerResult.FIRE;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public void clear(TimeWindow window, TriggerContext ctx) throws Exception {}\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void testSessionWindowsWithLateDataSideOutput() throws Exception {\n        // Test case: late element arriving after window cleanup should be side-outputted\n        // Scenario: first element creates window, second element extends it, then a very\n        // late element arrives that would merge but is past allowed lateness\n        final int sessionGap = 10; // milliseconds\n        final long allowedLateness = 5; // milliseconds\n\n        ListStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> stateDesc =\n                new ListStateDescriptor<>(\n                        \"window-contents\",\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                EventTimeSessionWindows.withGap(Duration.ofMillis(sessionGap)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                stateDesc,\n                                new InternalIterableWindowFunction<>(\n                                        new PassThroughWindowFunction<\n                                                String, TimeWindow, Tuple2<String, Integer>>()),\n                                EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                                allowedLateness,\n                                lateOutputTag);\n\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple2<String, Integer>>\n                testHarness = createTestHarness(operator);\n\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> expected = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> lateExpected = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n\n        // Create first element at timestamp 100 -> window [100, 110)\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 1), 100));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(50));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(50));\n\n        // Create second element at timestamp 105 -> merges into [100, 115)\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 2), 105));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(110));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(110));\n\n        // Now advance watermark past the allowed lateness window\n        // Window [100, 115) has maxTimestamp = 114, cleanup time = 114 + 5 = 119\n        // Watermark 119 fires and cleanup happens at next opportunity\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(120));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(120));\n\n        // Send a very late element at timestamp 104\n        // isElementLate(104): 104 + 5 = 109 <= 120, so YES it's late\n        // The element would create window [104, 114) which merges with the  now-retired [100,\n        // 115)\n        // Since the window is already past cleanup, the element should be side-outputted\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 3), 104));\n\n        lateExpected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 3), 104));\n\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expected,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n\n        Iterable<?> sideOutputActual = testHarness.getSideOutput(lateOutputTag);\n        assertThat(sideOutputActual).as(\"Side output should not be null\").isNotNull();\n\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"SideOutput was not correct.\",\n                lateExpected,\n                (Iterable) sideOutputActual,\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n\n        testHarness.close();\n    }\n}\n",

  "file_path": "/workspace/flink-streaming-java/src/test/java/org/apache/flink/streaming/runtime/operators/windowing/WindowOperatorTest.java",
  "new_string": "        // Send a very late element BEFORE window cleanup at timestamp 104\n        // isElementLate(104): 104 + 5 = 109 <= 115, so YES it's late\n        // The element would create window [104, 114) which merges with [100, 115)\n        // into [100, 115) (no extension since 114 < 115)\n        // Since the element is late AND the merged window is at the boundary,\n        // the element should be side-outputted\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 3), 104));\n\n        lateExpected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 3), 104));\n\n        // Now advance watermark past the allowed lateness window\n        // Window [100, 115) has maxTimestamp = 114, cleanup time = 114 + 5 = 119\n        // Watermark 120 passes cleanup time\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(120));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(120));",
  "old_string": "        // Now advance watermark past the allowed lateness window\n        // Window [100, 115) has maxTimestamp = 114, cleanup time = 114 + 5 = 119\n        // Watermark 120 passes cleanup time\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(120));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(120));\n\n        // Send a very late element at timestamp 104\n        // isElementLate(104): 104 + 5 = 109 <= 120, so YES it's late\n        // The element would create window [104, 114) which merges with the  now-retired [100,\n        // 115)\n        // Since the window is already past cleanup, the element should be side-outputted\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 3), 104));\n\n        lateExpected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 3), 104));",
  "replace_all": false

org.apache.flink.streaming.api.functions.windowing.WindowFunction;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.api.operators.OneInputStreamOperator;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.api.operators.OneInputStreamOperatorFactory;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.api.watermark.Watermark;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.assigners.DynamicEventTimeSessionWindows;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.assigners.DynamicProcessingTimeSessionWindows;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.assigners.EventTimeSessionWindows;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.assigners.GlobalWindows;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.assigners.ProcessingTimeSessionWindows;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.assigners.SessionWindowTimeGapExtractor;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.assigners.SlidingEventTimeWindows;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.assigners.SlidingProcessingTimeWindows;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.assigners.TumblingEventTimeWindows;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.assigners.TumblingProcessingTimeWindows;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.assigners.WindowAssigner;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.triggers.ContinuousEventTimeTrigger;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.triggers.CountTrigger;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.triggers.EventTimeTrigger;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.triggers.ProcessingTimeTrigger;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.triggers.PurgingTrigger;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.triggers.Trigger;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.triggers.TriggerResult;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.windows.GlobalWindow;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.windows.TimeWindow;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.windows.Window;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.runtime.operators.windowing.functions.InternalIterableProcessWindowFunction;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.runtime.operators.windowing.functions.InternalIterableWindowFunction;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.runtime.operators.windowing.functions.InternalSingleValueProcessWindowFunction;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.runtime.operators.windowing.functions.InternalSingleValueWindowFunction;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.runtime.streamrecord.StreamRecord;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.util.KeyedOneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.util.OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.util.TestHarnessUtil;\nimport org.apache.flink.streaming.util.asyncprocessing.AsyncKeyedOneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness;\nimport org.apache.flink.util.Collector;\nimport org.apache.flink.util.OutputTag;\n\nimport org.apache.flink.shaded.guava33.com.google.common.base.Joiner;\nimport org.apache.flink.shaded.guava33.com.google.common.collect.Iterables;\n\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\nimport org.junit.jupiter.params.ParameterizedTest;\nimport org.junit.jupiter.params.provider.ValueSource;\n\nimport java.io.Serializable;\nimport java.time.Duration;\nimport java.util.Collection;\nimport java.util.Collections;\nimport java.util.Comparator;\nimport java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentLinkedQueue;\nimport java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicInteger;\n\nimport static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\nimport static org.mockito.ArgumentMatchers.any;\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.mock;\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.when;\n\n/** Tests for {@link WindowOperator}. */\nclass WindowOperatorTest {\n\n    private interface HarnessProvider<IN, OUT> {\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple2<String, Integer>>\n                create();\n    }\n\n    private static final TypeInformation<Tuple2<String, Integer>> STRING_INT_TUPLE =\n            TypeInformation.of(new TypeHint<Tuple2<String, Integer>>() {});\n\n    // For counting if close() is called the correct number of times on the SumReducer\n    private static AtomicInteger closeCalled = new AtomicInteger(0);\n\n    // late arriving event OutputTag<StreamRecord<IN>>\n    private static final OutputTag<Tuple2<String, Integer>> lateOutputTag =\n            new OutputTag<Tuple2<String, Integer>>(\"late-output\") {};\n\n    private void testSlidingEventTimeWindows(\n            HarnessProvider<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple2<String, Integer>> harnessProvider)\n            throws Exception {\n\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple2<String, Integer>>\n                testHarness = harnessProvider.create();\n\n        testHarness.setup();\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> expectedOutput = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n\n        // add elements out-of-order\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 3999));\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 3000));\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 1), 20));\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 1), 0));\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 1), 999));\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 1998));\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 1999));\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 1000));\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 3), 999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new Watermark(999));\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expectedOutput,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 3), 1999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 3), 1999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new Watermark(1999));\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expectedOutput,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(2999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 3), 2999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 3), 2999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new Watermark(2999));\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expectedOutput,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n\n        // do a snapshot, close and restore again\n        OperatorSubtaskState snapshot = testHarness.snapshot(0L, 0L);\n        testHarness.close();\n\n        expectedOutput.clear();\n        testHarness = harnessProvider.create();\n        testHarness.setup();\n        testHarness.initializeState(snapshot);\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(3999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 5), 3999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new Watermark(3999));\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expectedOutput,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(4999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 2), 4999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new Watermark(4999));\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expectedOutput,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(5999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 2), 5999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new Watermark(5999));\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expectedOutput,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n\n        // those don't have any effect...\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(6999));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(7999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new Watermark(6999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new Watermark(7999));\n\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expectedOutput,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n\n        testHarness.close();\n    }\n\n    @SuppressWarnings(\"unchecked\")\n    @ParameterizedTest(name = \"Enable async state = {0}\")\n    @ValueSource(booleans = {false, true})\n    void testSlidingEventTimeWindowsReduce(boolean enableAsyncState) throws Exception {\n        closeCalled.set(0);\n\n        final int windowSize = 3;\n        final int windowSlide = 1;\n\n        ReducingStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> stateDesc =\n                new ReducingStateDescriptor<>(\n                        \"window-contents\",\n                        new SumReducer(),\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                SlidingEventTimeWindows.of(\n                                        Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize),\n                                        Duration.ofSeconds(windowSlide)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                stateDesc,\n                                new InternalSingleValueWindowFunction<>(\n                                        new PassThroughWindowFunction<\n                                                String, TimeWindow, Tuple2<String, Integer>>()),\n                                EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                                0,\n                                null /* late data output tag */);\n\n        WindowOperatorBuilder<Tuple2<String, Integer>, String, TimeWindow> builder =\n                new WindowOperatorBuilder<>(\n                        SlidingEventTimeWindows.of(\n                                Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize), Duration.ofSeconds(windowSlide)),\n                        EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                        new ExecutionConfig(),\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE,\n                        new TupleKeySelector(),\n                        TypeInformation.of(String.class));\n\n        testSlidingEventTimeWindows(\n                enableAsyncState\n                        ? () ->\n                                createAsyncTestHarness(\n                                        builder.asyncReduce(\n                                                new SumReducer(),\n                                                new PassThroughWindowFunction<>()))\n                        : () -> createTestHarness(operator));\n    }\n\n    @ParameterizedTest(name = \"Enable async state = {0}\")\n    @ValueSource(booleans = {false, true})\n    void testSlidingEventTimeWindowsApply(boolean enableAsyncState) throws Exception {\n        closeCalled.set(0);\n\n        final int windowSize = 3;\n        final int windowSlide = 1;\n\n        ListStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> stateDesc =\n                new ListStateDescriptor<>(\n                        \"window-contents\",\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                SlidingEventTimeWindows.of(\n                                        Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize),\n                                        Duration.ofSeconds(windowSlide)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                stateDesc,\n                                new InternalIterableWindowFunction<>(\n                                        new RichSumReducer<TimeWindow>()),\n                                EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                                0,\n                                null /* late data output tag */);\n\n        WindowOperatorBuilder<Tuple2<String, Integer>, String, TimeWindow> builder =\n                new WindowOperatorBuilder<>(\n                        SlidingEventTimeWindows.of(\n                                Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize), Duration.ofSeconds(windowSlide)),\n                        EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                        new ExecutionConfig(),\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE,\n                        new TupleKeySelector(),\n                        TypeInformation.of(String.class));\n\n        testSlidingEventTimeWindows(\n                enableAsyncState\n                        ? () -> createAsyncTestHarness(builder.asyncApply(new RichSumReducer<>()))\n                        : () -> createTestHarness(operator));\n\n        // we close once in the rest...\n        assertThat(closeCalled).as(\"Close was not called.\").hasValue(2);\n    }\n\n    private void testTumblingEventTimeWindows(\n            HarnessProvider<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple2<String, Integer>> harnessProvider)\n            throws Exception {\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple2<String, Integer>>\n                testHarness = harnessProvider.create();\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> expectedOutput = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        // add elements out-of-order\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 3999));\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 3000));\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 1), 20));\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 1), 0));\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 1), 999));\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 1998));\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 1999));\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 1000));\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new Watermark(999));\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expectedOutput,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new Watermark(1999));\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expectedOutput,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n\n        // do a snapshot, close and restore again\n        OperatorSubtaskState snapshot = testHarness.snapshot(0L, 0L);\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expectedOutput,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n        testHarness.close();\n\n        testHarness = harnessProvider.create();\n        expectedOutput.clear();\n        testHarness.setup();\n        testHarness.initializeState(snapshot);\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(2999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 3), 2999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 3), 2999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new Watermark(2999));\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expectedOutput,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(3999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new Watermark(3999));\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expectedOutput,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(4999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new Watermark(4999));\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expectedOutput,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(5999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 2), 5999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new Watermark(5999));\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expectedOutput,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n\n        // those don't have any effect...\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(6999));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(7999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new Watermark(6999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new Watermark(7999));\n\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expectedOutput,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n\n        testHarness.close();\n    }\n\n    @ParameterizedTest(name = \"Enable async state = {0}\")\n    @ValueSource(booleans = {false, true})\n    @SuppressWarnings(\"unchecked\")\n    void testTumblingEventTimeWindowsReduce(boolean enableAsyncState) throws Exception {\n        closeCalled.set(0);\n\n        final int windowSize = 3;\n\n        ReducingStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> stateDesc =\n                new ReducingStateDescriptor<>(\n                        \"window-contents\",\n                        new SumReducer(),\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                TumblingEventTimeWindows.of(Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                stateDesc,\n                                new InternalSingleValueWindowFunction<>(\n                                        new PassThroughWindowFunction<\n                                                String, TimeWindow, Tuple2<String, Integer>>()),\n                                EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                                0,\n                                null /* late data output tag */);\n\n        WindowOperatorBuilder<Tuple2<String, Integer>, String, TimeWindow> builder =\n                new WindowOperatorBuilder<>(\n                        TumblingEventTimeWindows.of(Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize)),\n                        EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                        new ExecutionConfig(),\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE,\n                        new TupleKeySelector(),\n                        TypeInformation.of(String.class));\n\n        testTumblingEventTimeWindows(\n                enableAsyncState\n                        ? () ->\n                                createAsyncTestHarness(\n                                        builder.asyncReduce(\n                                                new SumReducer(),\n                                                new PassThroughWindowFunction<>()))\n                        : () -> createTestHarness(operator));\n    }\n\n    @ParameterizedTest(name = \"Enable async state = {0}\")\n    @ValueSource(booleans = {false, true})\n    @SuppressWarnings(\"unchecked\")\n    void testTumblingEventTimeWindowsApply(boolean enableAsyncState) throws Exception {\n        closeCalled.set(0);\n\n        final int windowSize = 3;\n\n        ListStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> stateDesc =\n                new ListStateDescriptor<>(\n                        \"window-contents\",\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                TumblingEventTimeWindows.of(Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                stateDesc,\n                                new InternalIterableWindowFunction<>(\n                                        new RichSumReducer<TimeWindow>()),\n                                EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                                0,\n                                null /* late data output tag */);\n\n        WindowOperatorBuilder<Tuple2<String, Integer>, String, TimeWindow> builder =\n                new WindowOperatorBuilder<>(\n                        TumblingEventTimeWindows.of(Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize)),\n                        EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                        new ExecutionConfig(),\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE,\n                        new TupleKeySelector(),\n                        TypeInformation.of(String.class));\n\n        testTumblingEventTimeWindows(\n                enableAsyncState\n                        ? () -> createAsyncTestHarness(builder.asyncApply(new RichSumReducer<>()))\n                        : () -> createTestHarness(operator));\n\n        // we close once in the rest...\n        assertThat(closeCalled).as(\"Close was not called.\").hasValue(2);\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    @SuppressWarnings(\"unchecked\")\n    void testSessionWindows() throws Exception {\n        closeCalled.set(0);\n\n        final int sessionSize = 3;\n\n        ListStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> stateDesc =\n                new ListStateDescriptor<>(\n                        \"window-contents\",\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>>,\n                        Tuple3<String, Long, Long>,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                EventTimeSessionWindows.withGap(Duration.ofSeconds(sessionSize)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                stateDesc,\n                                new InternalIterableWindowFunction<>(new SessionWindowFunction()),\n                                EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                                0,\n                                null /* late data output tag */);\n\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple3<String, Long, Long>>\n                testHarness = createTestHarness(operator);\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> expectedOutput = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        // add elements out-of-order\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 0));\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 2), 1000));\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 3), 2500));\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 1), 10));\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 2), 1000));\n\n        // do a snapshot, close and restore again\n        OperatorSubtaskState snapshot = testHarness.snapshot(0L, 0L);\n\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expectedOutput,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple3ResultSortComparator());\n        testHarness.close();\n\n        testHarness = createTestHarness(operator);\n        testHarness.setup();\n        testHarness.initializeState(snapshot);\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 3), 2500));\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 4), 5501));\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 5), 6000));\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 5), 6000));\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 6), 6050));\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(12000));\n\n        expectedOutput.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key1-6\", 10L, 5500L), 5499));\n        expectedOutput.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-6\", 0L, 5500L), 5499));\n\n        expectedOutput.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-20\", 5501L, 9050L), 9049));\n        expectedOutput.add(new Watermark(12000));\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 10), 15000));\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 20), 15000));\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(17999));\n\n        expectedOutput.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-30\", 15000L, 18000L), 17999));\n        expectedOutput.add(new Watermark(17999));\n\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expectedOutput,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple3ResultSortComparator());\n\n        testHarness.close();\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    @SuppressWarnings(\"unchecked\")\n    void testSessionWindowsWithProcessFunction() throws Exception {\n        closeCalled.set(0);\n\n        final int sessionSize = 3;\n\n        ListStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> stateDesc =\n                new ListStateDescriptor<>(\n                        \"window-contents\",\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>>,\n                        Tuple3<String, Long, Long>,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                EventTimeSessionWindows.withGap(Duration.ofSeconds(sessionSize)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                stateDesc,\n                                new InternalIterableProcessWindowFunction<>(\n                                        new SessionProcessWindowFunction()),\n                                EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                                0,\n                                null /* late data output tag */);\n\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple3<String, Long, Long>>\n                testHarness = createTestHarness(operator);\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> expectedOutput = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        // add elements out-of-order\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 0));\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 2), 1000));\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 3), 2500));\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 1), 10));\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 2), 1000));\n\n        // do a snapshot, close and restore again\n        OperatorSubtaskState snapshot = testHarness.snapshot(0L, 0L);\n\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expectedOutput,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple3ResultSortComparator());\n        testHarness.close();\n\n        testHarness = createTestHarness(operator);\n        testHarness.setup();\n        testHarness.initializeState(snapshot);\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 3), 2500));\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 4), 5501));\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 5), 6000));\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 5), 6000));\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 6), 6050));\n\n
